description_long: This is a tall, open shelving unit with five evenly spaced rectangular shelves supported by a black metal frame. The shelves appear to be made of light-colored wood or laminate, providing a clean and modern look. The frame consists of four vertical metal rods, two on each side, connected by horizontal supports at the top and bottom. The design is minimalist, with no visible doors, drawers, or handles, making it suitable for displaying or storing items in urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces. The open sides and back allow for easy access to items from multiple angles. The overall construction suggests durability and stability, with a focus on functionality and simplicity.
description: A tall, open shelving unit with five light wood shelves and a black metal frame, featuring a minimalist and modern design. The structure is sturdy and accessible from all sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five shelves and the open, accessible design framed by black metal supports.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile and the depth of the shelves, with the metal frame visible along the edges.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the open back and the alignment of the shelves within the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the vertical metal supports.
